new_terms.context: Shift from chassis-based servers to integrated rack-level infrastructure.
A specialized Rubin-era accelerator optimized for prefill tasks.
Architectural bottleneck where performance is limited by FLOPs rather than memory bandwidth.
Architectural bottleneck where performance is limited by memory or interconnect bandwidth.
Individual silicon dies within a GPU package (e.g., 2 compute dies per Rubin package).
The scope of components affected by a single point of failure in a datacenter.
The amount of power consumed per rack unit or rack (e.g., 100KW+).
